message:
🐛 Fix bash syntax error in collect job (duplicate else/fi) (#27)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -172,10 +172,6 @@ jobs:
             else
               echo "draft_pr=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
             fi
-            else
-              echo "avg_score=0" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-              echo "draft_pr=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            fi
           else
             echo "avg_score=0" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
             echo "draft_pr=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
